name: Team Member Indirect Referral
description: Outreach to a team member (not hiring manager) to help forward resume to the right person
html_content:
Hi {{receiver_name}},

Apologies for the cold email — I'll keep it brief.

I recently came across an opening for the {{ROLE}} role on your team at {{company_name}} and felt my background could be a strong fit.

I'm Tejas, an SDE-1 at Interface.ai with 2 years of experience (including internship) at YC-backed and well-funded startups, including one backed by WhatsApp's co-founder. I studied at IIIT Gwalior and have a strong background in distributed systems, open-source contributions, and problem solving (Knight on LeetCode, 1880+ rating).

Since you're on the team, I thought you might be the right person to reach out to. If my profile seems like a fit, would you mind forwarding my resume to the hiring manager or pointing me to the best way to apply? You can check it out here or I've attached it for your convenience.

Completely understand if you'd rather not — no pressure at all.

Thanks so much for your time!

Best,
Tejas Thombare

global_variables.description: URL to job posting or career portal
